description_long: This is a large, single-story log cabin constructed primarily from timber, featuring a broad, dark gabled hip roof with deep overhangs. The exterior walls are made of horizontally stacked logs, giving it a rustic and robust appearance. The front facade includes a prominent covered porch with wooden railings and a set of wide steps leading up to the entrance. Multiple large, rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The foundation appears to be made of stone or concrete, elevating the structure slightly above ground level. The overall design is traditional, evoking a cozy, welcoming atmosphere suitable for residential or vacation use.
description: A spacious log cabin with a dark hip roof, large windows, and a covered front porch, built from timber logs and stone foundation.
description_view_0: The front and side of the cabin are visible, showcasing the main entrance, covered porch, and several large windows.
description_view_1: The view shows the rear of the cabin with a symmetrical window arrangement and no visible porch or doors.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the log construction, stone foundation, and the depth of the roof overhangs.
description_view_3: The view focuses on the porch area, with its wooden railings and steps, and the main entrance centered beneath the roof overhang.
attribute_roof_type: hip roof with deep overhangs, constructed from dark roofing material, no visible dormers or skylights
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple large, rectangular windows symmetrically arranged on the front and rear facades, with paired groupings and consistent spacing; no small or irregularly shaped windows visible
attribute_door_placement: Single main door located at the center of the front facade, accessed via the covered porch and steps; no other exterior doors visible
